pendingApplications.address: Land East Of The A34 And South Of A555 Handforth
pendingApplications.proposal: Reserved Matters application (access, appearance, landscaping, layout and scale) relating to Parcels 2 & 3 of Handforth Garden Village pursuant to application ref: 19/0623M for the erection of 106 dwellings, access from Dairy House Lane, landscaping, public open space, internal access roads, car parking and associated infrastructure.

pendingApplications.address: Former Armadillo Self Storage Earl Road Cheadle Hulme Cheadle SK8 6PT
pendingApplications.proposal: Discharge of Conditions 4 (Wildflower Mix), 14 (Construction Environmental Management Plan) and 23 (Construction Method Statement) of Planning Permission reference DC/091031 for Erection of 10 units for Class E(g)(ii) and/or Class E(g)(iii) and/or Class B8 (including Class B8 trade counters) use, two Class E(a) and/or Class E (b) and/or sui generis food and drink units with drive thru facilities, parking provision, landscaping and associated works.

pendingApplications.address: Land Rear Of Lambert House Old Road Cheadle SK8 2BP
pendingApplications.proposal: The erection of 16 dwellings (Use Class C3) including 13 no. semi-detached dwellings and 3 apartments, and all associated works.

pendingApplications.address: Land Off Moor Lane Woodford Stockport
pendingApplications.proposal: Residential development for around 125 dwellings, open space, landscaping, access from Moor Lane

pendingApplications.address: Land South Of Hyde East And West Of Stockport Road Hyde
pendingApplications.proposal: Hybrid planning application comprising: 1. Outline planning application with all matters reserved except for access for a residential development comprising up to 440 dwellings, public open space, landscaping and associated access and infrastructure works. 2. Full planning application for: (a) the restoration and conversion of the Apethorn Farmhouse building complex to 4 residential dwellings with associated ancillary structures,infrastructure and landscaping; and (b) the demolition of the Pear Tree Farm building complex and other specified onsite structures.

Discharge of Conditions 13 (Details of Parking, Servicing and Manoeuvring Areas), 14 (Mobility Scooter Parking), 27 (Boundary Treatments), 29 (External Lighting), 31 (External Plant) and 32 (Solar Photovoltaics) of Planning Permission reference DC/077046 for Demolition of existing sheltered housing scheme and the creation of a new 49 apartment extra care development, together with ancillary facilities including a bistro, salon, residents lounge, external amenity spaces and parking provision.

Discharge of Condition 11 (Property Resilience and Flood Event Emergency Management Plan) of Planning Permission reference DC/077046 for Demolition of existing sheltered housing scheme and the creation of a new 49 apartment extra care development, together with ancillary facilities including a bistro, salon, residents lounge, external amenity spaces and parking provision.
